ddls:
CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code (e.g., M3A, M4A, M5A) */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the postal code belongs to */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the postal code belongs to */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the postal code belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the postal code belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the postal code information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the postal code is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_codes_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough (e.g., North York, Downtown Toronto) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the borough belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the borough information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the borough is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood (e.g., Parkwoods, Victoria Village) */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the neighborhood belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the neighborhood information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the neighborhood is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic coordinate */,
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the postal code the coordinate belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic coordinate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the geographic coordinate information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the coordinate is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_coordinates_postal_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("postal_code_id") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postal_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, search) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was made */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* JSON string of the search results */,
  "search_duration" REAL /* Duration of the search query in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the map */,
  "map_date" TEXT /* Date when the map was generated */,
  "map_data" TEXT /* Map data (e.g., geographic coordinates, markers) */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of map generated (e.g., static, interactive) */,
  "map_zoom" INTEGER /* Zoom level of the map */,
  "map_center_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the map center */,
  "map_center_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the map center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the postal code the analytics data belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics data (e.g., population density, housing prices) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the analytics data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for the analytics data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_postal_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("postal_code_id") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postal_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data source is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrated data point */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source the integrated data belongs to */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was integrated */,
  "integration_data" TEXT /* Integrated data (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the data integration (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the integration data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integration_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
